## Bug Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is -->

## Steps To Reproduce

<!-- Steps to reproduce the behavior -->

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen -->

## Actual Behavior

<!-- What actually happened, include screenshots if applicable -->

## Environment

### Device Information

- **Device:** [e.g., iPhone 14 Pro, Samsung Galaxy S23, iPad Air]
- **OS:** [e.g., iOS 17.2, Android 14]
- **App Version:** [e.g., 0.1.0]
- **Platform:** [e.g., Native iOS, Native Android, Web]

### Browser Information (Web only)

- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome 120, Safari 17, Firefox 121]
- **Browser Version:** [e.g., 120.0.6099.109]

## Error Details

### Error Messages

<!-- Copy and paste any error messages from the console or app -->

```
Paste error messages here
```

### Console Logs (if applicable)

<!-- For web bugs, include browser console logs -->

```
Paste console logs here
```

### Screenshots/Videos

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or videos to help explain your problem -->

## Reproduction Frequency

- [ ] Always reproducible
- [ ] Sometimes reproducible
- [ ] Rarely reproducible
- [ ] Only happened once

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context about the problem here -->

## Possible Solution

<!-- If you have suggestions on how to fix the bug -->

## Impact

<!-- How does this bug affect your experience? -->

- [ ] App crash
- [ ] Feature not working
- [ ] UI/UX issue
- [ ] Performance issue
- [ ] Other (describe above)

- [ ] Bug confirmed
- [ ] Steps verified
